visualization.title: Classrooms by equipment type (projector only, computers only, both, neither)

resultRaw.sql:
WITH categorized AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN has_projector AND has_computers THEN 'both'
      WHEN has_projector AND NOT has_computers THEN 'projector_only'
      WHEN has_computers AND NOT has_projector THEN 'computers_only'
      ELSE 'neither'
    END AS equipment_type
  FROM public.classrooms
)
SELECT
  equipment_type,
  COUNT(*) AS classroom_count
FROM categorized
GROUP BY equipment_type
ORDER BY
  CASE equipment_type
    WHEN 'both' THEN 1
    WHEN 'projector_only' THEN 2
    WHEN 'computers_only' THEN 3
    WHEN 'neither' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END;

issues: Order mismatch vs. user wording: the question/plan list categories as (projector_only, computers_only, both, neither) but the SQL ORDER BY and viz sort use (both, projector_only, computers_only, neither). If a specific category order is required, align the SQL ORDER BY or the visualization sort with the requested order.
Legend suppressed: the visualization sets legend:null for the color encoding. Since color encodes equipment_type, hiding the legend may reduce clarity for readers.
